title: 2026 EB-5 & Global Immigration Expo Miami - Green & Spiegel
content:
## 2026 EB-5 & Global Immigration Expo Miami
Managing Partner Stephen Green will be speaking at the 2026 EB-5 & Global Immigration Expo Miami, hosted by Uglobal and EB5 Investors Magazine.
Stephen will participate in Panel 6, Unlocking Global Mobility: How to Choose the Right Global Investment Immigration Project and Programs for Your Migration Goals , where he will offer insights on Canadian immigration options within the broader investment migration landscape.
This premier event brings together leading professionals from across the immigration and investment sectors, offering valuable perspectives on global mobility strategies and emerging opportunities.

#### Stephen W. Green B.A., LL.B., C.S.
